metadata.title: Auto Hide
metadata.description: Collapse sidebars when clicking on the editor/viewer panel

regex.source: .setName("Expand the sidebar with a note title")
regex.target: .setName("单击上方笔记标题展开侧边栏")

regex.source: .setDesc("Click on the blank area of ribbon to expand the sidebar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("单击左侧功能区的空白区域以展开侧边栏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Click on the note title to expand the left sidebar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("单击笔记标题以展开左侧边栏。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Add a pin that can temporarily lock the sidebar collapse.")
regex.target: .setDesc("添加一个可以临时锁定侧边栏折叠的固定按钮。")
